v2_kitten.formal: A small orange tabby kitten with large eyes walks forward through a wooded area, emerging from behind dense green foliage onto ground covered with dirt and leaf litter. Sunlight filters through the surrounding leaves and tree trunks, casting dappled shadows across the scene as the kitten maintains an intensely focused expression while advancing.
v2_kitten.sarcastic: Ah yes, a small orange tabby kitten walking forward through some foliage, nature's most consequential event. The dense green leaves and dappled sunlight have assembled their full theatrical backdrop for this, a creature emerging with the gravity of someone who has definitely remembered where they left something. The leaf litter has been waiting all morning for this level of focus.
v2_kitten.humorous_tech: A small orange tabby kitten with large, intensely focused eyes walks forward from behind dense green foliage in a sun-dappled wooded area, every leaf on the ground registering in its gaze. Classic on-call engineer who's just been paged, already three steps into the incident response runbook before the alert even finished firing.
v2_kitten.humorous_non_tech: A tiny orange kitten marches out from behind the bushes with the grim determination of someone who just remembered they left the stove on, blazing a trail through the leaf litter like the forest floor is its own personal red carpet and the dappled sunlight is just the paparazzi it expected.

v1_boulevard.formal: Numerous vehicles in varied colors traverse a wide urban thoroughfare lined with trees bearing yellow and green autumn foliage. Tall apartment buildings and smaller structures rise behind the tree line, accompanied by streetlights, traffic signals, and signage, as motion blur indicates sustained vehicle movement. The low-angle lighting suggests early morning or late afternoon, illuminating the contrast between the seasonal foliage and the modern built environment.
v1_boulevard.sarcastic: Ah, cars moving along a road, each one apparently urgent in its own small way. The trees have gone to the considerable effort of turning yellow and green for the occasion, and the vehicles have responded with the gift of motion blur. Truly a city at the height of its powers, nature and infrastructure locked in a rivalry that traffic lights alone cannot settle.
v1_boulevard.humorous_tech: Long-exposure traffic streams down a wide autumn boulevard, each car dissolving into a colored streak as the trees burn gold against the glass towers behind them. Beautiful, someone cranked the motion blur up to eleven and called it a feature.
v1_boulevard.humorous_non_tech: A river of red, orange, white, and gray cars all rushing down the same wide road like they're late for the same thing they can't remember, while the trees on both sides are showing off their best yellow and green outfits to a city that only has eyes for the traffic lights ahead.

v3_office.formal: A woman with a large afro, wearing an orange top, a light-colored jacket, stud earrings, and a cross pendant necklace, sits at a white desk in an open-plan office and types on a computer keyboard while looking at the screen. Her facial expressions shift between surprise and concentration, indicating a reaction to on-screen content, as other people work at nearby desks, a large potted plant stands behind her, and a guitar leans against a wall in the background.
v3_office.sarcastic: A woman with a large afro sits at a white desk and types on a computer, her face cycling through the two timeless moods of office life: surprise and grim concentration. The potted plant behind her stands as a silent witness to this drama, probably the most living thing in the frame. One can only imagine what revelation the screen has offered, perhaps an email, perhaps a spreadsheet cell turning red, truly, the guitar leaning against the wall has the right idea just standing there.
v3_office.humorous_tech: A person with a large afro sits at a white desk in an open-plan office, typing with intense focus before their face cycles rapidly through surprise and concentration. The background is cluttered with other workers, black chairs, a potted plant, and a guitar leaning against a wall, classic startup aesthetic. Just another frontend developer watching the CI pipeline fail in real-time, refreshing the build log like it's going to reveal a different error on the seventeenth try.
v3_office.humorous_non_tech: A person with a big, impressive hairstyle sits at a desk surrounded by black chairs and white desks, typing away with the kind of shifting expressions that make you think they're either watching their bank account or a group chat where someone just said something they shouldn't have, while a guitar waits in the corner like that hobby we all bought and keep meaning to get back to.
